cau_hoi: It was the third time in six months that the bank had been held ........................................ .
giai_thich: hold up: đình trệ, bị cướp (trong ngữ cảnh ngân hàng)

cau_hoi: I always run ........................................ of money before the end of the month.
giai_thich: run out of st: hết sạch cái gì

cau_hoi: I’ve just spent two weeks looking ........................................ an aunt of mine who’s been ill.
giai_thich: look after: chăm sóc

cau_hoi: I’ve always got ........................................ well with old people.
giai_thich: get on well with: có mối quan hệ tốt với ai

cau_hoi: It’s very cold in here. Do you mind if I turn ........................................ the heating?
giai_thich: turn on: bật (thiết bị)

cau_hoi: They’ve ........................................ a new tower where that old building used to be.
giai_thich: put up: xây dựng lên
run into: tình cờ gặp
run down: mệt mỏi, kiệt sức
put away: cất đi, để dành tiền
run over: bị xe cán qua

cau_hoi: You may not like the noise, but you will have to put ........................................ .
giai_thich: put up with: chịu đựng
look into: điều tra, xem xét
Look out!: Coi chừng, cẩn thận

cau_hoi: The two countries have broken ........................................ relations.
giai_thich: break off: chấm dứt quan hệ

cau_hoi: Shall have to bring this matter ........................................ at the next meeting.
giai_thich: bring up: đề cập tới một vấn đề

cau_hoi: The new government has brought ........................................ many changes.
giai_thich: bring about: gây ra, đem lại sự thay đổi

cau_hoi: She used to be thin, but she is filled ........................................ a lot.
giai_thich: fill out: mập ra, béo ra
do away with: bãi bỏ, thủ tiêu

cau_hoi: As I have just had a tooth ........................................ , I am not allowed to eat or drink anything for three hours.
giai_thich: take out a tooth: nhổ răng

cau_hoi: The woman ........................................ when the police told her that her son had died.
giai_thich: break down: suy sụp, khóc nức nở

cau_hoi: Please ........................................ the light, it’s getting dark here.
giai_thich: turn on: bật đèn

cau_hoi: The nurse has to ........................................ the patients at the midnight.
giai_thich: look after: chăm sóc bệnh nhân
go up: tăng lên (giá cả)

cau_hoi: Remember to ........................................ your shoes when you are in a Japanese house.
giai_thich: take off: cởi (giày, quần áo)

cau_hoi: You can ........................................ the new words in the dictionary.
giai_thich: look up: tra cứu từ điển
put on: mặc áo vào

cau_hoi: If you want to be healthy, you should ........................................ your bad habits in your lifestyles.
giai_thich: give up: từ bỏ thói quen xấu

cau_hoi: Never put off until tomorrow what you can do today.
giai_thich: put off = delay: trì hoãn

cau_hoi: My father still hasn’t really recovered from the death of my mother.
giai_thich: get over = recover from: vượt qua nỗi đau/phục hồi

cau_hoi: The bomb exploded with a loud bang which could be heard all over the town.
giai_thich: go off = explode: nổ tung

cau_hoi: John, could you look after my handbag while I go out for a minute.
giai_thich: look after = take care of: chăm sóc, trông coi

cau_hoi: Why do they ........................................ talking about money all the time?
giai_thich: keep on: tiếp tục làm gì

cau_hoi: My father gave up smoking two years ago.
giai_thich: give up = stop: ngừng, bỏ

cau_hoi: The government hopes to ........................................ its plans for introducing cable TV.
giai_thich: carry out: tiến hành, thực hiện kế hoạch

cau_hoi: When the tenants failed to pay their bill, the authorities decided to ........................................ the gas supply to the flat.
giai_thich: cut off: ngừng cung cấp (điện, nước, gas)

cau_hoi: You go on ahead and then I’ll catch ........................................ you.
giai_thich: catch up with: đuổi kịp ai

cau_hoi: Both Ann and her sister look like her mother.
giai_thich: look like = take after: giống ai đó

cau_hoi: I’ll be back in a minute, Jane. I just want to try out my new tape recorder.
giai_thich: try out = test: thử nghiệm

cau_hoi: The national curriculum is made ........................................ of the following subjects: English, Maths, Chemistry and so on....
giai_thich: be made up of: bao gồm

cau_hoi: Shy people often find it difficult to ........................................ group discussions.
giai_thich: take part in: tham gia vào
